# OutreachOS — full summary

OutreachOS (https://outreachos.techxtreme.me) is a personal lead management and outreach workspace with a sketchbook-style UI.

## Who it is for

Solo founders, SDRs, and operators who import lead lists from Excel, keep them private per account, and work a call/email queue without a heavyweight CRM.

## Core flows

1. Sign up (email+password with verification, or Google).
2. Import Excel (.xlsx) with Business Name (required) plus niche, country, phone, address, Google Maps link.
3. Filter and select leads; use sticky call scripts while dialing.
4. Upgrade to Premium when the free 500-lead pool is full or import limits are hit.

## Plans

| Plan | Leads | Import files | Rows |
|------|-------|--------------|------|
| Free | 500 | 10 / day | 200 / file |
| Premium | Unlimited | 30 / hour | 3000 / hour |

Premium prices: ₹1499/month or $15/month (buyer chooses currency on /pricing).
Request Premium from /pricing — opens email to techxtremebuisness@gmail.com with your username pre-filled.

## Public URLs

- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/pricing
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/import-guide
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/privacy
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/terms
- https://outreachos.techxtreme.me/auth/signup

Authenticated app shells (/dashboard, /settings, /admin) are private and should not be indexed.
